# generated by Fast Light User Interface Designer (fluid) version 1.0500
&Fl_Button A1
Normal button (callback called only when released)
Fl_Button &A2
Normal button with callback called when changed (push and released)
Fl_Return_Button &B
Button with Return key as default shortcut
Fl_Light_Button &C
Button with toggle state and a visual indicator of the current state
Fl_Check_Button &D
Check button with toggle state
Fl_Round_Button &E
Round Button with toggle state
radio &1
Radio button, only one button is set at a time, in the corresponding group.
radio &2
Radio button, only one button is set at a time, in the corresponding group.
radio &3
Radio button, only one button is set at a time, in the corresponding group.
radio &4
Radio button, only one button is set at a time, in the corresponding group.
radio
Custom look button, only one button is set at a time, in the corresponding group.
radio
Custom look button, only one button is set at a time, in the corresponding group.
radio
Custom look button, only one button is set at a time, in the corresponding group.
radio
Custom look button, only one button is set at a time, in the corresponding group.
